testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Satisfied customers for over 10 years
testimonials.t1_text: The best peanuts in all of Lomé! Always fresh and perfectly roasted. I order every week.
testimonials.t2_text: The atsɔmo is excellent, just like my grandmother's. Fast delivery too!
testimonials.t3_text: Impeccable service on WhatsApp. I recommend to all my friends and family.
